title: ECC/Ed25519/Curve25519 miss ERASED-key guard post-generate
description: EccP256Key::generate, Ed25519Key::generate, and Curve25519Key::generate initialize key_id to KeyId::ERASED (0) but do not check whether key_id is still 0 after the FFI call returns rc=0. RsaKey::generate and MlDsaKey::generate both have the guard; these three do not. If the HSM writes rc=0 but leaves key_id=0 the wrapper silently constructs a handle with an invalid ID; all subsequent operations fail with opaque FFI errors instead of a clear Ffi error. Maintenance consequence: every future key type added using ECC/Ed25519 as a template will silently inherit the missing guard.
